headline: D4vd 🚔💀 BUSTED for Teen Tesla Trunkie 😱🍑
text:
Houston TikTok baddie D4vd 👦🎮🎤 – yeah, that 'Here With Me' 😩💔 moody Fortnite king 👑🕹️ who slayed SZA's SOS tour 🕺🔥 and dropped Petals To Thorns 🌹🩸 – just got HANDCUFFED 🚔🔒 on SUS of MURDERING 🎭💀 14yo Celeste Rivas Hernandez 🧒🇸🇻! Cops LAPD 🏙️👮‍♂️ say her DECOMPOSED HEAD 🧟‍♀️💀 and TORSO 🍑🔪 were STASHED in a CADAVER BAG 🛍️☠️ inside his TESLA BOOT 🚗🍆 – front trunk smelling like ROTTEN FUNK 😷🤮 from a Hollywood tow yard 🏪🚫 Sept 8! Found after 'FOUL ODOUR' reports 💨🤢 – girl been DEAD WEEKS 😵⏳, severely decomposed like a zombie flick 🧟📽️, no COD yet but GRAND JURY 🎭⚖️ targeting David Anthony Burke 👨‍🎤 21yo NO BAIL 😤🔒!

Lawyers SIMPING HARD 🤡💼: 'No evidence bby, David DIDN'T KILL 👎💀, no indictment, just SUS detention!' But filings SPILL TEA ☕📜 – D4vd's the MURDER TARGET 🎯🔪, daddy Dawud Burke 🧔 from Texas fought summons in court 🏛️🚫 but DROPPED BOMBS 💣 confirming Cali grand jury probing ONE COUNT MURDER 😱! Celeste, Lake Elsinore candy queen 🧸🍭🍬 first-gen El Salvador cutie 🇸🇻👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 who ran away before 🏃‍♀️💨, last missing April 2024 📅 – wore tube top 👚, black leggings 🖤🍑, yellow bling 💛📿... and TATTOO 'Shhh…' 🤫✋ on index finger MATCHING D4VD'S 🤫👆 CREEPY AF 😨👻!

Online sleuths WILDIN' 🕵️‍♂️🔥 hypothesizing singer-stan hookup gone WRONG 💔🔪 – she 75mi from home 🏠📍 but ends up in his Texas-reg Tesla 🚗🇨🇦? Judge SEALED death records 🔒📜 Nov to keep ME tips hush-hush 🤐! D4vd GO silent mode 📴 after raid on Hollywood Hills mansion 🏰🚔 blocks from tow yard, CANCELLED world tour 🌍❌, DROPPED by Hollister 👕 & Crocs 🥾 marketing 😩💸, even Kali Uchis Kali 🚫 their 'Crashing' collab 💔🎶! Fortnite anthem king 'Locked & Loaded' 🔒🔫 now LOCKED UP 😤🚔, 22M Spotify simps 😍📱 & 4M TikTok thots 🕺 still streaming Romantic Homicide 💀❤️ – but is this his FINAL BOSS LEVEL? 🎮💥 Grand jury hearing since Dec, arrest THURSDAY 🚨 – DA Monday ⚖️📅, evidence gonna SLAY or SAVE? 👀🔥 Wall Street who? This indie-pop prince turned PRIME SUSPECT 😈🍑 – Tesla trunk horror show got everyone GAGGING 😱🤮‼️
